short_description: A flexible rubber base gel for nail technicians who want a smooth base before colour or overlay work.
key_benefits: Helps create a neat, even-looking base
Works well for short-form product education videos

call_to_action: Shop Crystal Clawz Rubber Base Gel and upgrade your next set.

short_description: Reusable-style nail forms designed to help nail technicians shape extensions with more control.

target_customer: Nail technicians who create gel or acrylic extensions
